name: task_transition
description: Move a task from its current lifecycle state to a new target state. Valid states are: defining, compiling, compiled, in_progress, completed, and failed. State transitions are validated server-side. When completing a task, include results and artifacts. When failing a task, include the failure type and reason for diagnostics.

task_id.description: Unique identifier of the task to transition

target_state.description: The lifecycle state to transition the task to

failure_type.description: Type of failure when transitioning to 'failed' state

failure_reason.description: Human-readable explanation of why the task failed

results.description: Task results data when transitioning to 'completed' state

completion_notes.description: Summary notes about the completed work

identifier.description: Unique identifier for the artifact (e.g., PR number, file path)

artifacts.description: Array of artifacts produced during task execution

actual_duration.description: Actual time spent on the task (e.g., '1 hour 30 minutes')

examples.name: Complete a task with results and artifacts

results.summary: Identified root cause as N+1 query in search handler

parameters.completion_notes: Root cause was an N+1 query introduced in commit a1b2c3d. Fixed by adding eager loading. Latency dropped from 850ms to 230ms.

artifacts.description: Fix N+1 query in search endpoint

examples.name: Fail a task due to dependency failure

parameters.failure_reason: Upstream task task-ghi-789 failed: test environment unavailable. Cannot proceed with integration testing.
